compiled_state.title: Delete orphans: rebar_reconciler gap probes (probe_gap1_inbound_comments.sh, probe_gap2_status_outbound.sh)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Both create 'DSO Gap probe' Jira issues. Evidence: gap2 zero references; gap1 referenced only as a historical citation in docstrings (inbound_differ.py:356, test_inbound_comments_diff.py:3), never executed/sourced. Soften those two docstring mentions to past tense.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both probe scripts deleted
- [ ] inbound_differ.py:356 + test_inbound_comments_diff.py:3 citations reworded (no dead-file refs)
- [ ] Full suite green

comments.body: Done in commit 39dbfba. Full suite 1300 passed / 2 xfailed; targeted bash suites for touched scripts green.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
